{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Path of the Endless Shield
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of the Endless Shield]] is a path that [[Yerin]] is not on.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
